mapper.select: SELECT admin_id AS adminId, admin_pw AS adminPw, admin_name AS adminName, admin_role AS adminRole FROM admin WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}

SELECT seq AS seq, name AS name, phone AS phone, address AS address, car_model AS carModel, test_drive_time AS testDriveTime, qr_code_url AS qrCodeUrl, reg_date AS regDate FROM event_participant ORDER BY seq DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(reg_date) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS todayCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN entry_type = 'EVENT' AND qr_scan_time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS qrCheckCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN entry_type = 'DRIVE' AND qr_scan_time IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS driveWaitCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN entry_type = 'EVENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS eventCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN entry_type = 'DRIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS driveCnt FROM event_participant

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%m.%d') AS regDateStr, entry_type AS entryType, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM event_participant WHERE reg_date >= DATE(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 DAY)) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%m.%d'), entry_type

SELECT seq AS seq, entry_type AS entryType, name AS name, phone AS phone, address AS address, shop_info AS shopInfo, car_model AS carModel, test_drive_time AS testDriveTime, mkt_agree AS mktAgree, safety_agree AS safetyAgree, qr_code_url AS qrCodeUrl, qr_scan_time AS qrScanTime, reg_date AS regDate FROM event_participant WHERE entry_type = #{entryType} ORDER BY seq DESC

SELECT seq AS seq, entry_type AS entryType, name AS name, phone AS phone, address AS address, shop_info AS shopInfo, car_model AS carModel, test_drive_time AS testDriveTime, mkt_agree AS mktAgree, safety_agree AS safetyAgree, qr_code_url AS qrCodeUrl, qr_scan_time AS qrScanTime, reg_date AS regDate FROM event_participant WHERE seq = #{seq}
